Mohamed Hany.summary: Mohamed Hany Gamal El-Demerdash (Arabic: محمد هاني جمال الدمرداش; born 2 February 1996) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.

Mohamed Manai.name: Mohamed Manai
Mohamed Manai.summary: Mohamed Naceur Manai (Arabic: محمد مناعي‎; born 25 October 2002) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Al-Shamal, on loan from Al-Sadd, and the Qatar national team.

Mohamed Salah.name: Mohamed Salah
Mohamed Salah.summary: Mohamed Salah Hamed Mahrous Ghaly (born 15 June 1992) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a right winger or right midfielder. He captains the Egypt national team.
Mohamed Salah.note: Egypt's decisive outlet, a transition runner and finisher every opponent has to bend their shape around.

Mohammad Mohebbi.name: Mohammad Mohebbi
Mohammad Mohebbi.summary: Mohammad Mehdi Mohebi (Persian: محمدمهدی محبی; born 10 February 2000), known as Mehdi Mohebi, is an Iranian footballer who plays as a winger for Iranian club Sepahan in the Persian Gulf Pro League and the Iran national team.
Mohammad Mohebbi.note: Scored for IR Iran in IR Iran vs New Zealand.

Mohammed Al-Owais.name: Mohammed Al-Owais
Mohammed Al-Owais.summary: Mohammed Khalil Ibrahim Al-Owais (Arabic: مُحَمَّد خَلِيل إِبْرَاهِيم الْعُوَيْس; born 10 October 1991) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Al-Ula and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Mohammed Al-Owais.note: The experienced goalkeeper, vital if Saudi Arabia spend long stretches defending their box.

Moises Caicedo.name: Moises Caicedo
Moises Caicedo.summary: Moisés Isaac Caicedo Corozo (born 2 November 2001) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Chelsea and the Ecuador national team.
Moises Caicedo.note: Ecuador's midfield eraser and ball mover, vital for disrupting opponents before they reach the back line.

Mostafa Mohamed.name: Mostafa Mohamed
Mostafa Mohamed.summary: Mostafa Mohamed Ahmed Abdallah (Egyptian Arabic: مصطفي محمد احمد عبد الله; born 28 November 1997) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Ligue 2 club Nantes and the Egypt national team.
Mostafa Mohamed.note: The central target, important when Egypt need hold-up play and a box endpoint.

Mostafa Zico.name: Mostafa Zico
Mostafa Zico.summary: Mostafa Mohamed Zaky Abdelraouf (Arabic: مصطفى محمد زكي عبد الرؤوف; born 27 April 1997), known as Mostafa Ziko, is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids and the Egypt national team.
Mostafa Zico.note: Scored for Egypt in New Zealand vs Egypt.

Mousa Al-Taamari.name: Mousa Al-Taamari
Mousa Al-Taamari.summary: Musa Mohammad Sulaiman Al-Taamari (Arabic: مُوسى مُحَمَّد مُوسى سُلَيْمَان التَعمري; born 10 June 1997), also spelled as Mousa Al-Tamari, is a Jordanian professional footballer of Palestinian origin who plays as a right winger for Ligue 1 club Rennes and the...
Mousa Al-Taamari.note: Jordan's star ball-carrier, a direct runner who can make counters feel dangerous immediately.

Nathan Saliba.name: Nathan Saliba
Nathan Saliba.summary: Nathan-Dylan Saliba (born February 7, 2004) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays for Belgian Pro League club Anderlecht and the Canada national team.
Nathan Saliba.note: Scored for Canada in Canada vs Qatar.

Nathaniel Brown.name: Nathaniel Brown
Nathaniel Brown.summary: Nathaniel Christopher Brown (born 16 June 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt and the Germany national team.
Nathaniel Brown.note: Scored for Germany in Germany vs Curaçao.

Nestory Irankunda.name: Nestory Irankunda
Nestory Irankunda.summary: Nestory Irankunda (/nɛstəriː ɪrəŋkʊndɑ/ NEST-ər-EE ir-əng-KUN-da; Kirundi: [iɾaŋkunda]; born 9 February 2006) is a professional soccer player who plays as a winger for EFL Championship club Watford. Born in Tanzania, he plays for the Australia national team.
Nestory Irankunda.note: Scored for Australia in Australia vs Türkiye.

Neymar.name: Neymar
Neymar.summary: Neymar da Silva Santos Júnior (Brazilian Portuguese pronunciation: [nejˈmaʁ dɐ ˈsiwvɐ ˈsɐ̃tuz ˈʒuni.oʁ] ; born 5 February 1992), simply known as Neymar Júnior (shortened to Neymar Jr) or mononymously as Neymar, is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays...
Neymar.note: Brazil's imagination hub when they need disguise, combination play, and fouls drawn around the box.

Nico Schlotterbeck.name: Nico Schlotterbeck
Nico Schlotterbeck.summary: Nico Cédric Schlotterbeck (German pronunciation: [ˈniːko ˈʃlɔtɐˌbɛk]; born 1 December 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays primarily as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Germany national team.
Nico Schlotterbeck.note: Scored for Germany in Germany vs Curaçao.

Nico Williams.name: Nico Williams
Nico Williams.summary: Nicholas Williams Arthuer (born 12 July 2002) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a winger for La Liga club Athletic Bilbao and the Spain national team. He is recognised for his speed and dribbling skills.
Nico Williams.note: The vertical winger who turns switches of play into immediate pressure on the box.

Nicolas Jackson.name: Nicolas Jackson
Nicolas Jackson.summary: Nicolas Jackson (born 20 June 2001) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a striker and winger for Premier League club Chelsea, and the Senegal national team.
Nicolas Jackson.note: A mobile striker whose runs behind the line give Senegal a faster, less predictable edge.

Noah Sadiki.name: Noah Sadiki
Noah Sadiki.summary: Noah Junior Sadiki (born 17 December 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Premier League club Sunderland. Born in Belgium, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Noah Sadiki.note: A young midfield runner who matters when DR Congo need to escape pressure and connect the first pass forward.

Noor Al-Rawabdeh.name: Noor Al-Rawabdeh
Noor Al-Rawabdeh.summary: Noor Al-Deen Mahmoud Ali Al-Rawabdeh (Arabic: نُور الدِّيْن مَحمُود عَلِيّ الرَّوَّابدَة; born 24 February 1997) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Malaysia Super League club Selangor and the Jordan national team.
Noor Al-Rawabdeh.note: The midfield worker who helps Jordan's block stay connected before the break is on.

Oh Hyeongyu.name: Oh Hyeongyu
Oh Hyeongyu.summary: Oh Hyeon-gyu (Korean: 오현규; born 12 April 2001) is a South Korean professional footballer who plays as a forward for Süper Lig club Beşiktaş and the South Korea national team.
Oh Hyeongyu.note: Scored for South Korea in South Korea vs Czechia.

Omar Marmoush.name: Omar Marmoush
Omar Marmoush.summary: Omar Khaled Mohamed Abdelsalam Marmoush (Egyptian Arabic: عمر خالد محمد عبد السلام مرموش; born 7 February 1999) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Manchester City and the Egypt national team.
Omar Marmoush.note: A mobile second scoring threat who can attack channels and keep Egypt from becoming one-dimensional.

Omar Rekik.name: Omar Rekik
Omar Rekik.summary: Omar Rekik (Arabic: عمر رقيق; born 20 December 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Slovenian PrvaLiga club Maribor. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the Tunisia national team.
Omar Rekik.note: Scored for Tunisia in Sweden vs Tunisia.

Ousmane Dembele.name: Ousmane Dembele
Ousmane Dembele.summary: Masour Ousmane Dembélé (French pronunciation: [us.man dɛm.be.le]; born 15 May 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward or right winger for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team.
Ousmane Dembele.note: Scored for France in France vs Iraq.

Patrik Schick.name: Patrik Schick
Patrik Schick.summary: Patrik Schick (born 24 January 1996) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen and the Czech Republic national team.
Patrik Schick.note: Czechia's main finisher in the box, especially dangerous when crosses and second balls arrive early.

Pedri.name: Pedri
Pedri.summary: Pedro González López (born 25 November 2002), more commonly known as Pedri, is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team. Pedri is considered one of the best midfielders in the world.
Pedri.note: The rhythm setter in open space, making Spain's possession feel calmer and more incisive.

Petar Musa.name: Petar Musa
Petar Musa.summary: Petar Musa (Croatian pronunciation: [pětar mûsa]; born 4 March 1998) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Major League Soccer club FC Dallas and the Croatia national team.
Petar Musa.note: Scored for Croatia in England vs Croatia.

Piero Hincapie.name: Piero Hincapie
Piero Hincapie.summary: Piero Martín Hincapié Reyna (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈpjeɾo iŋkaˈpje]; born 9 January 2002) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Arsenal, on loan from Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen, and the...
Piero Hincapie.note: The left-sided defensive anchor, comfortable stepping out to defend space and start attacks.

Ramin Rezaeian.name: Ramin Rezaeian
Ramin Rezaeian.summary: Ramin Rezaeian (born 21 March 1990) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Persian Gulf Pro League club Esteghlal and the Iran national team. He started his career as a right-back, but he often plays as a winger.
Ramin Rezaeian.note: Scored for IR Iran in IR Iran vs New Zealand.

Raul Jimenez.name: Raul Jimenez
Raul Jimenez.summary: Raúl Alonso Jiménez Rodríguez (Latin American Spanish: [raˈul xiˈmenes]; born 5 May 1991) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a striker for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers and the Mexico national team.
Raul Jimenez.note: Scored for Mexico in Mexico vs South Africa.

Ritsu Doan.name: Ritsu Doan
Ritsu Doan.summary: Ritsu Dōan (堂安 律, Dōan Ritsu; born 16 June 1998) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt and the Japan national team.
Ritsu Doan.note: A left-footed attacker who can arrive inside from the right and give Japan punch when combinations reach the final third.

Riyad Mahrez.name: Riyad Mahrez
Riyad Mahrez.summary: Riyad Karim Mahrez (born 21 February 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Al-Ahli. Born in France, he captains the Algeria national team.
Riyad Mahrez.note: Algeria's left-footed creator, still the player who can slow a match down and pick the decisive pass.

Roberto Lopes.name: Roberto Lopes
Roberto Lopes.summary: Roberto Carlos Lopes (Portuguese: [ʀu.ˈbɛ.tu ˈkaɾ.luʒ ˈlɔpɨʃ]; born 17 June 1992), also known as Pico (Kabuverdianu: [ˈpi.ku]), is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Shamrock Rovers.
Roberto Lopes.note: The defensive organizer, central to keeping Cabo Verde compact through long spells without the ball.

Romano Schmid.name: Romano Schmid
Romano Schmid.summary: Romano Christian Schmid (born 27 January 2000) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Werder Bremen and the Austria national team.
Romano Schmid.note: Scored for Austria in Austria vs Jordan.

Romelu Lukaku.name: Romelu Lukaku
Romelu Lukaku.summary: Romelu Lukaku Bolingoli (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈroːmeːlu luˈkaːku]; born 13 May 1993) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club Napoli and the Belgium national team.
Romelu Lukaku.note: The reference point in the box and power finisher, built to punish any service into his stride or feet.

Ronald Araujo.name: Ronald Araujo
Ronald Araujo.summary: Ronald Federico Araújo da Silva (Spanish pronunciation: [roˈnald aɾaˈuxo]; born 7 March 1999) is an Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Barcelona, whom he captains, and the Uruguay national team.
Ronald Araujo.note: The recovery defender and duel winner, essential against elite forwards in open grass.

Ronwen Williams.name: Ronwen Williams
Ronwen Williams.summary: Ronwen Hayden Williams (born 21 January 1992) is a South African soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier Soccer League club Mamelodi Sundowns and captains the South Africa national team.
Ronwen Williams.note: South Africa's captain and shot-stopper, important when opponents turn territory into sustained pressure.

Ruben Vargas.name: Ruben Vargas
Ruben Vargas.summary: Rubén Estephan Vargas Martínez (born 5 August 1998) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Spanish La Liga club Sevilla and the Switzerland national team.
Ruben Vargas.note: Scored for Switzerland in Switzerland vs Bosnia and Herzegovina.

Ryan Mendes.name: Ryan Mendes
Ryan Mendes.summary: Ryan Isaac Mendes da Graça (Portuguese: [ʀi.ˈɐ̃ i.ˈzak ˈmẽ.dɨʒ dɐ ˈɡɾa.sɐ]; born 8 January 1990) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a winger for TFF 1. Lig club Iğdır and the Cape Verde national team.
Ryan Mendes.note: Cabo Verde's experienced attacking reference, useful when counters need a composed final action.

Sadio Mane.name: Sadio Mane
Sadio Mane.summary: Sadio Mané (born 10 April 1992) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Senegal national team.
Sadio Mane.note: Senegal's senior attacking leader, still the name who can turn a direct move into a decisive action.

Salem Al-Dawsari.name: Salem Al-Dawsari
Salem Al-Dawsari.summary: Salem Mohammed Shafi Al-Dawsari (Arabic: سَالِم مُحَمَّد شَافِي الدَّوْسَرِيّ; born 19 August 1991) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a left winger and captains both Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Salem Al-Dawsari.note: Saudi Arabia's big-moment wide attacker, trusted to carry counters and take on defenders.

Saman Ghoddos.name: Saman Ghoddos
Saman Ghoddos.summary: Saman Ghoddos (Persian: سامان قدّوس; born 6 September 1993), known as Seyed Saman Ghoddoos in Iran, is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or striker for the Iran national team and Kalba in UAE Pro League.
Saman Ghoddos.note: A versatile connector who gives Iran a calmer pass when counters need more than one touch.

Santiago Gimenez.name: Santiago Gimenez
Santiago Gimenez.summary: Santiago Tomás “Santi” Giménez (Spanish pronunciation: [sanˈtjaɣo toˈmas xiˈmenes]; born 18 April 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club AC Milan. Born in Argentina, he represents the Mexico national team.
Santiago Gimenez.note: Mexico's focal striker, valuable when home pressure turns into repeated box touches.

Sarpreet Singh.name: Sarpreet Singh
Sarpreet Singh.summary: Sarpreet Singh (born 20 February 1999) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for A-League Men club Wellington Phoenix, on loan from Serbian SuperLiga club TSC and the New Zealand national team.
Sarpreet Singh.note: A technical creator who can make New Zealand less predictable when space appears in open space.

Scott McTominay.name: Scott McTominay
Scott McTominay.summary: Scott Francis McTominay (born 8 December 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Napoli. Born in England, he plays for the Scotland national team.
Scott McTominay.note: Scotland's late-arriving goal threat, most dangerous when midfield runs crash into the box.

Sead Kolasinac.name: Sead Kolasinac
Sead Kolasinac.summary: Sead Kolašinac (pronounced [sěad kolaʃîːnats]; born 20 June 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Atalanta. Born in Germany, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Sead Kolasinac.note: A physical left-sided defender who can make the game uncomfortable in duels.

Simon Adingra.name: Simon Adingra
Simon Adingra.summary: Simon Adingra (born 1 January 2002) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Monaco, on loan from Premier League club Sunderland, and the Ivory Coast national team.
Simon Adingra.note: The wide accelerator, important when Côte d'Ivoire need to turn a defensive stand into a fast attack.

Son Heung-min.name: Son Heung-min
Son Heung-min.summary: Son Heung-min (Korean: 손흥민; pronounced [son.ɣɯŋ.min]; born 8 July 1992) is a South Korean professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC and captains the South Korea national team.
Son Heung-min.note: South Korea's captain and most reliable shot threat, lethal when space opens behind the defensive line.

Stephen Eustaquio.name: Stephen Eustaquio
Stephen Eustaquio.summary: Stephen Antunes Eustáquio ( STEF-ən; born 21 December 1996) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC, on loan from Primeira Liga club Porto, and vice-captains the Canada national team.
Stephen Eustaquio.note: A midfield stabilizer who helps Canada avoid turning the match into only end-to-end breaks.

Tahith Chong.name: Tahith Chong
Tahith Chong.summary: Tahith Jose Girigorio Djorkaef Chong (born 4 December 1999) is a Curaçaoan professional footballer who plays as a wide midfielder or attacking midfielder for EFL Championship club Sheffield United and the Curaçao national team.
Tahith Chong.note: A direct wide outlet who gives Curaçao a runner when they escape pressure and attack open space.

Takefusa Kubo.name: Takefusa Kubo
Takefusa Kubo.summary: Takefusa Kubo (born 4 June 2001), commonly known as Take Kubo, is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a right winger for La Liga club Real Sociedad and the Japan national team.
Takefusa Kubo.note: Japan's sharpest creator in tight spaces, especially dangerous when he can cut inside onto his left foot.

Teboho Mokoena.name: Teboho Mokoena
Teboho Mokoena.summary: Teboho Mokoena (born 24 January 1997) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Premiership side Mamelodi Sundowns and the South Africa national team.
Teboho Mokoena.note: The midfield competitor and restart threat who can turn a defensive spell into South Africa possession.

Tomas Soucek.name: Tomas Soucek
Tomas Soucek.summary: Tomáš Souček (Czech pronunciation: [ˈtomaːʃ ˈsoutʃɛk]; born 27 February 1995) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club West Ham United and the Czech Republic national team.
Tomas Soucek.note: A set-piece and late-run threat whose aerial presence can tilt a tight group match.

Trezeguet.name: Trezeguet
Trezeguet.summary: Mahmoud Ahmed Ibrahim Hassan (Arabic: محمود أحمد إبراهيم حسن; born 1 October 1994), commonly known as Trézéguet (Arabic: تريزيجيه), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt...
Trezeguet.note: Scored for Egypt in New Zealand vs Egypt.

Tyler Adams.name: Tyler Adams
Tyler Adams.summary: Tyler Shaan Adams (born February 14, 1999) is an American professional soccer player who plays for Premier League club Bournemouth and the United States national team.
Tyler Adams.note: The ball-winning organizer at the base of midfield, crucial when the match opens into transition.

Viktor Gyokeres.name: Viktor Gyokeres
Viktor Gyokeres.summary: Viktor Einar Gyökeres (Swedish: [ˈvɪ̌kːtɔr ˈjø̂ːkɛrɛs]; born 4 June 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Arsenal and the Sweden national team.
Viktor Gyokeres.note: A relentless power forward whose carries and pressing can turn Sweden from structured to explosive.

Vinicius Junior.name: Vinicius Junior
Vinicius Junior.summary: Vinícius José Paixão de Oliveira Júnior (Brazilian Portuguese: [viˈni.sjuz ʒoˈzɛ pajˈʃɐ̃w̃ dʒi oliˈvej.ɾɐ ˈʒu.njoʁ]; born 12 July 2000), commonly known as Vinícius Júnior or Vini Jr., is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga...
Vinicius Junior.note: The devastating left-sided runner, capable of breaking a match with one isolation or carry in behind.

Virgil van Dijk.name: Virgil van Dijk
Virgil van Dijk.summary: Virgil van Dijk (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈvɪrdʑɪl vɑn ˈdɛik]; born 8 July 1991) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for and captains both Premier League club Liverpool and the Netherlands national team.
Virgil van Dijk.note: The defensive reference point, controlling aerial duels and giving the Netherlands confidence to hold a higher line.

Vitinha.name: Vitinha
Vitinha.summary: Vítor Machado Ferreira (born 13 February 2000), known as Vitinha (Portuguese pronunciation: [viˈtiɲɐ]), is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the Portugal national team.
Vitinha.note: A press-resistant rhythm setter who can turn Portugal's possession into cleaner entries around the box.

Vozinha.name: Vozinha
Vozinha.summary: Josimar José Évora Dias (Portuguese: [ʒɔ.zi.ˈmaɾ ʒu.ˈzɛ ˈɛ.vu.ɾɐ ˈdi.ɐʃ]; born 3 June 1986), known as Vozinha (Kabuverdianu: [vɔ.ˈzi.ɲɐ]), is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Cape Verde national team.
Vozinha.note: The veteran goalkeeper whose shot-stopping can keep Cabo Verde alive in narrow games.

Weston McKennie.name: Weston McKennie
Weston McKennie.summary: Weston James Earl McKennie (born August 28, 1998) is an American professional soccer player who plays primarily as a midfielder for Serie A club Juventus and the United States national team.
Weston McKennie.note: A box-to-box connector whose second-ball work and set-piece timing give the U.S. midfield bite.

William Saliba.name: William Saliba
William Saliba.summary: William Alain André Gabriel Saliba (French: [wiljam saliba]; born 24 March 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Arsenal and the France national team.
William Saliba.note: The defensive stabilizer, calm enough to defend space while France's athletes surge forward.

Yasin Ayari.name: Yasin Ayari
Yasin Ayari.summary: Yasin Ayari (Arabic: ياسين عباس عياري; born 6 October 2003) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Brighton & Hove Albion and the Sweden national team.
Yasin Ayari.note: A mobile midfield connector whose timing helps Sweden link their two-forward threat to the rest of the side.

Yazan Alarab.name: Yazan Alarab
Yazan Alarab.summary: Yazan Mousa Mahmoud Abu Al-Arab (Arabic: يَزَن مُوسَى مَحْمُود أَبُو الْعَرَب; born 31 January 1996) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for K-League side FC Seoul and the Jordan national team.

Yoane Wissa.name: Yoane Wissa
Yoane Wissa.summary: Yoane Wissa (born 3 September 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward or left winger for Premier League club Newcastle United. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Yoane Wissa.note: DR Congo's direct running threat, the outlet who can turn counters into shots when opponents overcommit.

Zidane Iqbal.name: Zidane Iqbal
Zidane Iqbal.summary: Zidane Aamar Iqbal (Arabic: زيدان عمار إقبال; Urdu: زیدان عمار اقبال; born 27 April 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Eredivisie club Utrecht. Born in England, he plays for the Iraq national team.
Zidane Iqbal.note: The midfield connector, valuable when Iraq need composure rather than only defensive running.
